title: Backport Paintings 1.21
description: Backports all 20 paintings from the 1.21 update
body:
This Mod adds all 20 paintings from the 1.21 update to older versions.

- You can get the 20 Paintings in the same way like the normal vanilla ones
- This mod does not replace any existing paintings

_You are free to include this mod in your modpacks_
